  • Uses of AbstractPredicateAbstractionDomainElement in de.uka.ilkd.key.axiom_abstraction.predicateabstraction

    Subclasses of AbstractPredicateAbstractionDomainElement in de.uka.ilkd.key.axiom_abstraction.predicateabstraction
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    class 
    ConjunctivePredicateAbstractionDomainElement
    An abstract domain element for a predicate abstraction lattice based on the conjunction of predicates.
    class 
    DisjunctivePredicateAbstractionDomainElement
    An abstract domain element for a predicate abstraction lattice based on the disjunction of predicates.
    class 
    SimplePredicateAbstractionDomainElement
    An abstract domain element for a predicate abstraction lattice encapsulating exactly one abstraction predicate.
